meta.title: Krasnovska PH — Editorial photography, Szczecin
meta.description: Intimate photography studio in Szczecin. Personal, love story & family sessions. Book online.

home.heroSub: Editorial portrait, love story and family photography in Szczecin. Unhurried sessions, soft natural light and frames worth living inside — only a handful of shoots each month, each one built around your story.

forWho.title: Who it's for
forWho.body: For people who'd rather be seen than staged — individuals, couples and families who want honest images with a quiet, timeless mood, and no stiff camera-face.

session.title: The session
session.body: We open with a conversation and a moodboard, then shoot in daylight at a studio or location you love. I guide posing and styling the whole way — you never have to wonder what to do with your hands.

locationBlock.title: The place
locationBlock.body: Based in the heart of Szczecin, working the coast and the region — and travelling for sessions across Poland and Europe on request.

home.ctaBody: Pick a date and tell me your story — I reply within 24 hours.

studio.title: Photography as a form of attention
studio.intro: I'm an editorial photographer based in Szczecin. I work slowly and close — so the image says more than words.
studio.approach: Natural light, minimal direction, maximum presence. I don't stage — I observe and wait for the moment a person becomes themselves.
studio.philosophy: I believe in quiet luxury: less, but better. A frame free of noise. Emotion that doesn't shout.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: A selection of work from recent years. Filter by category.

services.title: Price list
services.intro: Two clear packages. Each one can be tailored to you.

personal.name: Personal session
items: help with posing, styling, studios, locations and props

love-family.name: Love story & family
love-family.description: A love story or family session.
items: help with posing, styling, studios, locations and props

process.title: How we work
process.intro: Six steps from the first message to finished frames.

steps.title: Inquiry
steps.body: You write via the form. I learn your story and expectations.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.body: A talk about the vision, location and styling. We build a moodboard.

steps.title: Session
steps.body: The shoot day. Natural light, calm, presence.

steps.title: Selection
steps.body: I pick the best frames and send you a preview gallery.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.body: Final photos in a high-resolution online gallery.

faq.q: How fast will I get the photos?
faq.a: Preview gallery in 3–5 days, finals in 2–3 weeks depending on the package.

faq.q: Do you help choose a location?
faq.a: Yes — during the consultation I suggest places that fit the mood of the session.
We reschedule free of charge to the nearest convenient day.
Yes, each additional edited frame can be purchased after the session.

contact.title: Book a session
contact.intro: Pick a date and fill in the form. I reply within 24 hours.
contact.noSlots: No open slots on this day.
contact.pickDate: Pick a day to see the times.

success.title: Thank you.
success.body: Your request is received. A confirmation was sent to you — I'll be in touch soon.

contact.error: Something went wrong. Try again or write to hello@krasnovska.ph.
